strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure; Staff-level positions demonstrate technical depth
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) development, showing active engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative, product thinking, and ability to build platforms solving real customer problems
concerns: AI expertise is brand new (2 months in current role); no demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products, platforms, or driving AI strategy decisions
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field despite it being a preferred qualification for this director-level role
Career breadth across full-stack development lacks focus on strategic technical leadership, AI innovation, or recognized industry expertise in AI/cloud strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of established AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
19 years of engineering experience exceeds 15-year requirement
Recent MCP work and entrepreneurial background show potential alignment

response.justification: Aisha is a solid full-stack engineer with 19 years of experience and demonstrated craftsmanship. However, this Principal Engineer role explicitly requires specialized AI expertise, strategic technical leadership, and ideally advanced AI credentials. Her AI experience is too recent (2 months) to establish her as the recognized expert the role demands. While her engineering foundation is strong and her current trajectory toward AI infrastructure is promising, she lacks the established track record of AI product development, customer advisory work, or strategic AI impact required for this director-level position.
